page_content:
HLTH386 Experiential Learning (3-6 Credits)

Prerequisite: Permission of SPHL-Behavioral & Community Health department.

Restriction: Junior standing or higher.

HLTH389 Independent Study in Public Health Practice (1-6 Credits) Independent study by an individual student. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
